name: Maximum Principles
description: Elliptic: interior max on boundary. Parabolic: max at t=0 or boundary. Comparison, uniqueness.
mermaid:
graph TD
    D1["Def: Elliptic op\nLu=∑aᵢⱼ∂²+..."]
    D2["Def: Subsolution\nLu≥0"]
    D3["Def: Supersolution\nLu≤0"]
    D4["Def: Strong max\ninterior max⇒const"]
    T1["Thm: Weak max\nΔu≥0⇒max on ∂Ω"]
    T2["Thm: Strong max\nelliptic Lu≥0"]
    T3["Thm: Parabolic max\nu_t−Δu≥0"]
    T4["Thm: Comparison\nu≤v on ∂⇒u≤v"]
    T5["Thm: Uniqueness\nfrom max princ"]
    D1 --> T1
    D2 --> T2
    D3 --> T4
    D4 --> T2
    T1 --> T4
    T2 --> T5
    T3 --> T4
    classDef definition fill:#b197fc,color:#fff
    classDef theorem fill:#51cf66,color:#fff
    class D1,D2,D3,D4 definition
    class T1,T2,T3,T4,T5 theorem
